name: 华北平原
description: North China Plain — major agricultural region covering Beijing, Tianjin, Hebei, Henan, and Shandong

name: 长江三角洲
description: Yangtze River Delta — densely populated region including Shanghai, Jiangsu, and Zhejiang

name: 四川盆地
description: Sichuan Basin — inland basin known for agriculture and persistent cloud cover

name: 东北平原
description: Northeast China Plain — major grain production base in Heilongjiang, Jilin, and Liaoning
